name: BB:FalsePositive: Syslog Sender False Positive Categories
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive categories that occur to or from syslog sources.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: Syslog Sender False Positive Categories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Syslog Servers and Senders
where the attack context is Local to Local
when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: DDoS Attack Events
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: Syslog Sender False Positive Categories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND where the attack context is Local to Local
